title: Retro MC
body:
Retro MC is a modpack that attempts to recreate the alpha/beta Minecraft feel in 1.20.1 Minecraft.

## MAJOR MODS/RESOURCE PACKS

- **Bad Wither No Cookie:** Makes world wide sounds (wither spawn, thunder, etc.) localized
- **Cascades:** Brings beta terrain generation to modern Minecraft
- **e4mc:** Easier and faster LAN servers in case you want to play with friends
- **Golden Days Base:** Programmer art style for new textures
- **Mod Menu:** In-game configuration for mods
- **NetherPortalFix:** Fixes multiplayer nether portals
- **Simple Fog Control:** Better fog
(Any other projects that may appear are library and/or optimization mods)
